shadowSentences: The sun is shining brightly today.
We went for a long walk yesterday.
He often listens to music while studying.
They plan to travel to Europe next summer.
I find it relaxing to paint in my free time.
The team worked hard to finish the project on time.
After dinner, we usually watch a movie together.
Learning a new language can be challenging but rewarding.

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about exercise habits.
questions: Q1: Can you share your personal experience with exercise?
Q2: What challenges do you face when trying to stay active?
Q3: What is your opinion on the importance of regular exercise?
Q4: What advice would you give someone looking to start an exercise routine?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about dietary preferences.
questions: Q1: What are your favorite types of food?
Q2: Have you ever faced any challenges with your diet?
Q3: How do you think diet impacts overall health?
Q4: What recommendations would you give someone trying to eat healthier?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to participate in a study on environmental awareness.
questions: Q1: Can you describe your personal views on environmental issues?
Q2: What challenges do people face in being environmentally friendly?
Q3: In your opinion, why is environmental awareness important?
Q4: What steps can individuals take to help the environment?
